mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_CATEGORY_NO AS "boardCategory", BOARD_CATEGORY FROM BOARD_TYPE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_POST B LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON B.USER_NO = M.USER_NO WHERE B.BOARD_DELETE = 'N'
AND B.BOARD_CD_NO IN (2, 3)
AND B.BOARD_CD_NO = #{boardCdNo}
AND
B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' M.USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' (B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD_POST ( BOARD_NO, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_CD_NO, USER_NO, VIEW_COUNT, BOARD_DATE, BOARD_DELETE ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardCdNo}, #{userNo}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
